Thanks for sending a pull request!

-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/CI
- [ ] Breaking change

## Related issues

<!-- "Fixes #123" closes the linked issue when merged. Use "Refs #123" for partial work. -->

Fixes #

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe how you verified the change. Manual steps are fine for UI work. -->

- [ ] Builds locally (`xcodebuild ... build`)
- [ ] Manually tested in the popover
- [ ] Tested on macOS version: ___
- [ ] Tested on Apple Silicon / Intel

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, drag a before/after screenshot or a short screen recording. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's [coding style](../CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-style).
- [ ] Each commit is small and focused, with a clear subject line.
- [ ] I have updated the [CHANGELOG](../CHANGELOG.md) if this PR is user-visible.
- [ ] I have updated the README or other docs if needed.
